generated_oml:
instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the position of the gantry crane trolley and hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the speed of the gantry crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance LoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the load weight on the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor, SpeedSensor, LoadSensor
]

instance CraneStateDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded crane state data including position, speed, and load measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database enabler for storing and querying time-series crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, OptimalControlService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for version control of digital twin code and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelVersioningService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization using Docker for deployment and dissemination of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python-based interface component connecting physical crane controllers to virtual twin services"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model used for visualization and description of the gantry crane digital twin architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that logs historical crane operation data for performance tracking and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of crane operations for monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal control parameters for crane operation to enhance efficiency and safety"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service ensuring alignment between physical crane and digital twin models through continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAlignmentInsight
]

instance ModelVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing version control of digital twin models using GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelVersionInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying the digital twin using containerization technologies"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical crane data to track system performance and identify trends"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status visualization of crane operations to support immediate decision-making"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane movement parameters based on real-time data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelAlignmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming consistency between physical and digital models for reliable operation"
]

instance ModelVersionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight tracking model versions and changes for traceability"
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful deployment of digital twin components"
]

instance GantryCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane used for research and education"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control system of the gantry crane that manages movement and safety protocols"
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory setting where the gantry crane digital twin is deployed for educational and research purposes"
    base:contains GantryCraneStructure, CraneController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application (Python) are sent via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which executes them on the hardware. Trajectory Generator Service provides movement trajectories for the Control Application. Specific command formats, validation, authentication, and feedback mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs AutomationML for digital twin modeling, integrates Raspberry Pi sensor data with Microsoft Azure cloud services for pipeline implementation, and uses containerization for deployment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication among containers, with services exchanging data via MQTT. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Uses AutomationML as an interoperability standard and Microsoft Azure tools for cloud-based data exchange with external systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar implements the AutomationML standard [14] for digital twin modeling and utilizes Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline implementation."
]
